problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
